before: Inventory FileAsset rows missing storage_version_id or sha256.
Prepare an exact VersionId and SHA-256 manifest for every legacy row.
after: Require Status=Enabled before releasing checksum-pinned uploads.
Run the legacy identity pin migration in dry-run mode, then apply it.
Verify complete retry and download use the persisted VersionId.
rollback: Do not suspend versioning while application records reference VersionId.
Restore FileAsset identity columns only from the migration rollback snapshot.
Roll back application code before any approved versioning suspension.
